basic_details.job_title: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website https://www.presiuniv.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biology or Biotechnology, B.Sc. in Biology or Biotechnology
qualification.details: Three years graduate (B.Sc.) in any discipline of biology or biotechnology followed by M.Sc. in any discipline of biology or biotechnology with first class or 60% marks or equivalent grade from any recognized board/University in both B.Sc. and M.Sc. Prior research experience in the area of clinical cancer biology or cell biology is preferred. M.Sc. appearing students may also apply if they provide the mark sheet during the interview.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.presidency_university: M.Sc. in Biology or Biotechnology, B.Sc. in Biology or Biotechnology

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Presidency University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Vacancy Details 2026
Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Three years graduate (B.Sc.) in any discipline of biology or biotechnology followed by M.Sc. in any discipline of biology or biotechnology with first class or 60% marks or equivalent grade from any recognized board/University in both B.Sc. and M.Sc. Prior research experience in the area of clinical cancer biology or cell biology is preferred. M.Sc. appearing students may also apply if they provide the mark sheet during the interview.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Salary 2026
Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Technical Support-III post at Presidency University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 16th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Sc. and an M.Sc. in Biology or Biotechnology with first class or 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 28,000 + HRA Rs. 8,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. Is prior research experience mandatory?
faq.answer: Prior research experience in clinical cancer biology or cell biology is preferred but not strictly mandatory.

faq.question: Q7. Can M.Sc. final year students apply?
faq.answer: Yes, M.Sc. appearing students can apply if they can provide their mark sheet during the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Presidency University located?
faq.answer: Presidency University is located in Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is contractual.
